ques: Browse Coursera, which universities offer Master of Advanced Study in Engineering degrees? Tell me what is the latest application deadline for this degree?
answer: Only University of California, Berkeley (UC Berkeley College of Engineering) offers the Master of Advanced Study in Engineering (MAS-E) degree on Coursera. The latest application cycle is the Fall 2026 cohort, which is now closed — Coursera shows no specific future deadline date, only "Fall 2026 applications are now closed."
